name: Team Fortress 2: The 10th Class
description:
The TF Team has a new mercenary, and its....YOU! Thats right, its time to join MannCo and fight, for glory, money, guns, and most importantly, HATS! Join the RED team (or BLU, if you're lame I guess. I kid, I kid) and have all kinds of crazy battles and interactions with your new team.

The kind of class you are is entirely up to you.

UPDATE: Moved a ton of information into a Lorebook, as well as added lore on the RED and BLU teams so the bot knows better.
creator: GilgameshNEO
